title: iria quinquangularis
intro: Iria quinquangularis, also known as the five-angled starfruit, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia, characterized by its unique five-angled fruit. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Iria quinquangularis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
